# PETSTORE PUT /user/{username}

## Method
- `PUT`

## Path
- `/user/{username}`

## Summary
Update user resource.

## Parameters
- `username` (path, string, required)

## Auth
- not specified

## Error Model
- `400`: bad request
- `404`: user not found

## Examples
- no explicit examples
